prompt: Create a realistic full-body concert photograph of a young Japanese idol singer performing on a large outdoor festival stage at dusk. She stands center foreground, facing the camera, holding a black handheld microphone near her mouth with her right hand while her left arm reaches high upward in a triumphant pose; her legs are crossed gracefully as if mid-dance. She has long dark brown hair with soft waves and wispy bangs, natural idol makeup, delicate earrings, and a confident, sweet expression. Her outfit is an elegant white and pale ice-blue idol costume: cropped embellished bustier top, short fitted jacket with silver trim and jeweled epaulettes, layered translucent tiered mini skirt with sparkling blue edging, decorative rhinestone chains at the waist, ankle cuffs, and white heeled ankle boots with crystal details. The background shows a huge concert LED screen displaying a live close-up of the same singer, large metal stage truss structures, bright blue stage lights, and a dense cheering audience waving blue glow sticks. Add white confetti falling through the air and reflections on a glossy stage floor. Use a vertical 2:3 composition, dynamic low-angle stage perspective, shallow depth of field, cinematic blue and lavender dusk lighting, high detail, realistic photography, glamorous J-pop concert atmosphere. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra performers in the foreground, or distorted hands.
promptEn: Create a realistic full-body concert photograph of a young Japanese idol singer performing on a large outdoor festival stage at dusk. She stands center foreground, facing the camera, holding a black handheld microphone near her mouth with her right hand while her left arm reaches high upward in a triumphant pose; her legs are crossed gracefully as if mid-dance. She has long dark brown hair with soft waves and wispy bangs, natural idol makeup, delicate earrings, and a confident, sweet expression. Her outfit is an elegant white and pale ice-blue idol costume: cropped embellished bustier top, short fitted jacket with silver trim and jeweled epaulettes, layered translucent tiered mini skirt with sparkling blue edging, decorative rhinestone chains at the waist, ankle cuffs, and white heeled ankle boots with crystal details. The background shows a huge concert LED screen displaying a live close-up of the same singer, large metal stage truss structures, bright blue stage lights, and a dense cheering audience waving blue glow sticks. Add white confetti falling through the air and reflections on a glossy stage floor. Use a vertical 2:3 composition, dynamic low-angle stage perspective, shallow depth of field, cinematic blue and lavender dusk lighting, high detail, realistic photography, glamorous J-pop concert atmosphere. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra performers in the foreground, or distorted hands.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的全身演唱会照片，展示一位年轻的日本偶像歌手在黄昏时分的户外大型音乐节舞台上表演。她站在前景中央，面向镜头，右手拿着黑色手持麦克风靠近嘴边，左臂高高举起，呈现出胜利的姿态；双腿优雅地交叉，仿佛正在跳舞。她留着 长深棕色卷发，带有轻盈的刘海，化着自然的偶像妆容，佩戴精致的耳环，表情自信而甜美。她身穿一套优雅的 白色和淡冰蓝色 偶像演出服：带有装饰的短款胸衣上衣，带有银色饰边和镶钻肩章的短款修身外套，层叠的半透明多层迷你裙，裙边带有闪亮的蓝色装饰，腰间饰有水钻链条，脚踝处有装饰，并穿着带有水晶细节的白色高跟短靴。背景展示了一个巨大的演唱会 LED 屏幕，上面播放着同一位歌手的现场特写，还有大型金属舞台桁架结构、明亮的蓝色舞台灯光，以及挥舞着蓝色荧光棒的密集欢呼人群。添加飘落在空中的白色五彩纸屑，以及光亮舞台地板上的倒影。采用 2:3 竖构图，动态的低角度舞台视角，浅景深，电影般的蓝色和淡紫色黄昏光影，高细节，写实摄影，充满魅力的 J-pop 演唱会氛围。避免出现文字、标志、水印、前景中多余的表演者或扭曲的手部。
